    Class Description
    AndCriteria
    Implementation of criteria that filters whatever doesn't meet both criteria specified.
    Circle
    Implementation of Shape representing a circle
    CriteriaFemale
    Implementation of criteria that filters whatever is female.
    CriteriaMale
    Implementation of criteria that filters whatever is male.
    CriteriaMarried
    Implementation of criteria that filters whatever is married.
    CriteriaPatternDemo
    Usage of Filter design pattern
    CriteriaPatternDemoTest  
    CriteriaSingle
    Implementation of criteria that filters whatever is single.
    FacadePatternDemo
    Usage of Facade design pattern
    FactoryPatternDemo
    Usage of Factory design pattern
    OrCriteria
    Implementation of criteria that filters whatever doesn't meet either criteria specified.
    Person
    Person with 3 attributes: their name, gender (male or female), and marital status (single or married)
    Rectangle
    Implementation of Shape representing a rectangle
    ShapeFactory
    Implementation of Factory design pattern
    ShapeFactoryTest  
    ShapeMaker
    Implementation of Facade design pattern

    Implementation of Shape representing a square
